body.value: Sent by Amer. Brewers' Review Co.
Over 1,000 STOCKHEIM FILTERS have been Bought and are in
Successful Operation in the following Breweries
Kankakee, Radeke, F. D., B'g Co. 1
Quincy, Dick Bros., Quincy B'g Co. 2
South Chicago, S. Chicago B'g Co. 1
Evansville, Cook, F. W., B'g Co.. 2
Michigan City, Zorn, Ph., B'g Co. 1
Terre Haute, Terre Haute B'g Co. 1
See preceding page and following three pages.
